revision.text: #REDIRECT [[八剣神社 (習志野市)]]

'''八剣神社'''（やつるぎじんじゃ）という名前の[[神社]]は日本各地に存在する。その名の通り八本の剣を神体あるいは祭神とするもののほか、[[スサノオ]]、[[大国主]]、[[ヤマトタケル|日本武尊]]を祭神とするものなど様々ある。
*[[八剱八幡神社]]（千葉県木更津市） *[[八剣神社 (習志野市)]]（千葉県習志野市） *[[八剣神社 (葛飾区)]]（東京都葛飾区） *[[八剣神社 (調府市)]]（東京都調府市） *[[八剣神社 (諏訪市)]]（長野県諏訪市） *[[八剣宮]]（愛知県名古屋市熱田区 [[熱田神宮]]別宮） *[[八剣神社 (一宮市)]]（愛知県一宮市） *[[八剣神社 (羽島市)]]（岐阜県羽島市） *[[八剣神社 (岐南町)]]（岐阜県羽島郡岐南町） *[[八剣神社 (天理市)]]（奈良県天理市） *[[八剣神社 (北九州市)]]（福岡県北九州市八幡西区） *[[八剣神社 (水巻町)]]（福岡県遠賀郡水巻町） *[[八剱神社 (遠賀町)]]（福岡県遠賀郡遠賀町今古賀） *[[八剱神社 (遠賀町)]]（福岡県遠賀郡遠賀町広渡） *[[八剣神社 (鞍手町)]]（福岡県鞍手郡鞍手町） *[[八剣神社 (柳川市)]]（福岡県柳川市） {{aimai}}

*[[八剱八幡神社]]（千葉県木更津市） *[[八剣神社 (習志野市)]]（千葉県習志野市） *[[八剣神社 (葛飾区)]]（東京都葛飾区） *[[八剣神社 (調府市)]]（東京都調府市） *[[八剣神社 (諏訪市)]]（長野県諏訪市） *[[八剣宮]]（愛知県名古屋市熱田区 [[熱田神宮]]別宮） *[[八剣神社 (一宮市)]]（愛知県一宮市） *[[八剣神社 (羽島市)]]（岐阜県羽島市） *[[八剣神社 (岐南町)]]（岐阜県羽島郡岐南町） *[[八剣神社 (天理市)]]（奈良県天理市） *[[八剣神社 (北九州市)]]（福岡県北九州市八幡西区） *[[八剣神社 (水巻町)]]（福岡県遠賀郡水巻町） *[[八剱神社]] (遠賀町)（福岡県遠賀郡遠賀町今古賀） *[[八剱神社]] (遠賀町)（福岡県遠賀郡遠賀町広渡） *[[八剣神社 (鞍手町)]]（福岡県鞍手郡鞍手町） *[[八剣神社 (柳川市)]]（福岡県柳川市） {{aimai}}

revision.text:
{{Aimai Top}} '''八剣'''（'''剱'''・'''劔'''・'''劍'''）'''神社'''（はっけんじんじゃ / やつるぎじんじゃ）、'''八剣'''（'''劔'''）'''社'''（はっけんしゃ / やつるぎしゃ）は[[神社]]。その名の通り8本の剣を神体あるいは祭神とするもののほか、[[素戔嗚尊]]、[[大国主神]]、[[日本武尊]]を祭神とするものなど様々ある。

==一覧== ===関東地方=== * [[八剱神社 (習志野市)]] - 千葉県習志野市鷺沼鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (葛飾区)]] - 東京都葛飾区奥戸鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (調府市)]] - 東京都調府市菊野台鎮座 ===中部地方=== * [[八剣神社_(諏訪市)|八劔神社 (諏訪市)]] - 長野県諏訪市小和田鎮座 * [[八劍神社 (諏訪市)]] - 長野県諏訪市豊田鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (南木曽町)]] - 長野県南木曽町柿其鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)]] - 岐阜県岐阜市芋島鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (岐阜市中)]] - 岐阜県岐阜市中鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (大垣市)]] - 岐阜県大垣市上石津町下多良鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (海津市海津町)]] - 岐阜県海津市海津町日原鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (海津市平田町)]] - 岐阜県海津市平田町岡鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (可児市)]] - 岐阜県可児市久々利鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (郡上市)]] - 岐阜県郡上市美並町三戸鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (関市西神野)]] - 岐阜県関市西神野鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (関市上之保)]] - 岐阜県関市上之保鎮座 * [[八劍神社 (土岐市下石町)]] - 岐阜県土岐市下石町鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (土岐市妻木町)]] - 岐阜県土岐市妻木町掛花鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (土岐市肥田町)]] - 岐阜県土岐市肥田町肥田鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (羽島市足近町南之川)]] - 岐阜県羽島市足近町南之川鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)]] - 岐阜県羽島市小熊町相田鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)]] - 岐阜県羽島市桑原町八神鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (羽島市竹鼻町)]] - 岐阜県羽島市竹鼻町鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (羽島市堀津町)]] - 岐阜県羽島市堀津町鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (瑞浪市)]] - 岐阜県瑞浪市北小田町鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (本巣市)]] - 岐阜県本巣市春近鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (輪之内町)]] - 岐阜県安八郡輪之内町大藪鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (白川町)]] - 岐阜県加茂郡白川町上佐見鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (八百津町)]] - 岐阜県加茂郡八百津町和知鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (岐南町)]] - 岐阜県羽島郡岐南町下印食鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (養老町)]] - 岐阜県養老郡養老町下笠鎮座 * [[八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)]] - 愛知県名古屋市天白区野並鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (岡崎市千万町町)]] - 愛知県岡崎市千万町町宮西鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)]] - 愛知県一宮市木曽川町外割田鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)]] - 愛知県一宮市更屋敷鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (一宮市田所)]] - 愛知県一宮市田所鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (一宮市玉野)]] - 愛知県一宮市玉野鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (一宮市萩原町萩原)]] - 愛知県一宮市萩原町萩原鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (東浦町)]] - 愛知県知多郡東浦町森岡鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市浅野)]] - 愛知県一宮市浅野鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市上祖父江)]] - 愛知県一宮市上祖父江鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市瀬部)]] - 愛知県一宮市瀬部鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市時之島)]] - 愛知県一宮市時之島鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市萩原町戸苅)]] - 愛知県一宮市萩原町戸苅鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市明地)]] - 愛知県一宮市明地鎮座 *[[八剱神社 (岩倉市)]] - 愛知県[[岩倉市]]にある神社。 * [[八剱神社 (豊山町)]] - 愛知県西春日井郡豊山町 * [[八劔神社 (蒲郡市)]] - 愛知県蒲郡市三谷町鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (清須市)]] - [[愛知県]][[清須市]]に鎮座する神社。
===近畿地方=== * [[八劔神社 (大阪市)]] - 大阪府大阪市城東区鴫野東鎮座 * [[阿遅速雄神社]] - 大阪府大阪市鶴見区放出東鎮座 江戸時代の頃は、八剣神社と称されていた。 * [[八剱神社 (天理市)]] - 奈良県天理市田井庄町鎮座 ===中国地方=== * [[八剣神社 (広島市)]] - 広島県広島市中区白島九軒町鎮座 ===九州地方=== * [[八剱神社 (北九州市八幡西区)]] - 福岡県北九州市八幡西区本城鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (北九州市若松区小敷)]] - 福岡県北九州市若松区小敷鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (北九州市若松区塩屋)]] - 福岡県北九州市若松区塩屋鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (柳川市)]] - 福岡県柳川市大和町中島鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (遠賀町今古賀)]] - 福岡県遠賀郡遠賀町今古賀鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (遠賀町広渡)]] - 福岡県遠賀郡遠賀町広渡鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (水巻町)]] - 福岡県遠賀郡水巻町立屋敷鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (鞍手町)]] - 福岡県鞍手郡鞍手町小牧鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (鞍手町)]] - 福岡県鞍手郡鞍手町中山鎮座

'''八剣'''（'''剱'''・'''劔'''・'''劍'''）'''神社'''（はっけんじんじゃ / やつるぎじんじゃ）、'''八剣'''（'''劔'''）'''社'''（はっけんしゃ / やつるぎしゃ）は[[神社]]。その名の通り8本の剣を神体あるいは祭神とするもののほか、[[素戔嗚尊]]、[[大国主神]]、[[日本武尊]]を祭神とするものなど様々ある。

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Hachiken Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yaken Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yaken Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yaken Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Hachiken Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Hachiken Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Hachiken Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Hakken Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - Located in Kaminoho, Seki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Shimoishi Town, Toki)|ja|八劍神社 (土岐市下石町)}} - Located in Shimoishi Town, {{ill|Toki, Gifu|ja|土岐市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Tsumagi Town, Toki)|ja|八剱神社 (土岐市妻木町)}} - Located in Tsukika, Tsumagi Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Hida Town, Toki)|ja|八劔神社 (土岐市肥田町)}} - Located in Hida Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Minamikawa, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市足近町南之川)}} - Located in Minamikawa, Ashitaka Town, {{ill|Hashima, Gifu|ja|羽島市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Oguma Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)}} - Located in Oguma Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kuwabara Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)}} - Located in Kuwabara Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Takenohana Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市竹鼻町)}} - Located in Takenohana Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Horitsu Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市堀津町)}} - Located in Horitsu Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kitakoda, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Kitakoda Town, {{ill|Mizunami, Gifu|ja|瑞浪市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Tō Town, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Tō Town, Mizunami City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Mototsu)|ja|八剱神社 (本巣市)}} - Located in Haruchika, {{ill|Mototsu, Gifu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Wanochi)|ja|八剣神社 (輪之内町)}} - Located in Oyabu, {{ill|Wanochi, Gifu|ja|輪之内町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Shirakawa Town)|ja|八剱神社 (白川町)}} - Located in Kamisami, {{ill|Shirakawa, Gifu|ja|白川町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Yaotsu)|ja|八剱神社 (八百津町)}} - Located in Waji, {{ill|Yaotsu, Gifu|ja|八百津町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ginan)|ja|八剣神社 (岐南町)}} - Located in Shimoinjiki, {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|ja|岐南町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Yōrō)|ja|八剣神社 (養老町)}} - Located in Shimokasa, {{ill|Yōrō, Gifu|ja|養老町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Atsuta Shrine)|ja|八剣宮}} - Located in Jingu, {{ill|Atsuta Ward|ja|熱田区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, Aichi Prefecture. A subsidiary of {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|ja|熱田神宮}}. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)}} - Located in Ōmori, {{ill|Moriyama Ward|ja|守山区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Tenpaku, Nonami)|ja|八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)}} - Located in Nonami, {{ill|Tenpaku Ward|ja|天白区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|八剱神社 (岡崎市千万町町)}} - Located in Senmanchō-chō, Okazaki, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kisogawa Town, Ichinomiya)|ja|八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)}} - Located in Kiso River Town, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ja|一宮市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ichinomiya Sarayashiki)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)}} - Located in Sarayashiki, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ichinomiya Tadokoro)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市田所)}} - Located in Tadokoro, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ichinomiya Tamano)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市玉野)}} - Located in Tamano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ichinomiya Hagiwara)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市萩原町萩原)}} - Located in Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Higashiura)|ja|八劔神社 (東浦町)}} - Located in Morioka, {{ill|Higashiura, Aichi|ja|東浦町}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine and Shinmei Shrine|ja|八劔神社・神明社}} - Located in Sakushima, {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ichinomiya Asano)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市浅野)}} - Located in Asano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ichinomiya Kamisobue)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市上祖父江)}} - Located in Kamisobue, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ichinomiya Sebe)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市瀬部)}} - Located in Sebe, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ichinomiya Tokinoshima)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市時之島)}} - Located in Tokinoshima, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ichinomiya Togari)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市萩原町戸苅)}} - Located in Togari, Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ichinomiya Meiji)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市明地)}} - Located in Meiji, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Iwakura)|ja|八剱神社 (岩倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|ja|岩倉市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Toyoyama)|ja|八剱神社 (豊山町)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyoyama|ja|豊山町}}, Nishikasugai District, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Gamagōri)|ja|八劔神社 (蒲郡市)}} - Located in Mitani Town, {{ill|Gamagōri, Aichi|ja|蒲郡市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kiyosu)|ja|八剱神社 (清須市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kiyosu|ja|清須市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Chiryū)|ja|八剱社 (知立市)}} - Located in Kamishigehara, {{ill|Chiryū|ja|知立市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Ama)|ja|八劔社 (あま市)}} - Located in Kida, {{ill|Ama, Aichi|ja|あま市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|八劔社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in Hanada Town, {{ill|Toyohashi|ja|豊橋市}}, Aichi Prefecture.
== Kinki Region == * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Osaka)|ja|八劔神社 (大阪市)}} - Located in Shiginohigashi, {{ill|Jōtō Ward|ja|城東区}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture.<ref>[http://www.880.jp 八劔神社]</ref> * {{ill|Ajihayao Shrine|ja|阿遅速雄神社}} - Located in Hanatenhigashi, {{ill|Tsurumi Ward|ja|鶴見区}}, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture. In the Edo period, it was called Hakken Shrine. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Hiroshima)|ja|八剣神社 (広島市)}} - Located in Hakushima Kyūken-chō, {{ill|Naka Ward, Hiroshima|ja|広島市中区}}, Hiroshima Prefecture.
== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Hakken Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yaken Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yaken Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yaken Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Hachiken Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Hachiken Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Hakken Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - A subsidiary of {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|ja|熱田神宮}}. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)}} - Located in Ōmori, {{ill|Moriyama Ward|ja|守山区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenpaku, Nonami)|ja|八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)}} - '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - In the Edo period, it was called Yatsurugi Shrine. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture.

== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - Located in Minamikawa, Ashitaka Town, {{ill|Hashima, Gifu|ja|羽島市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Oguma Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)}} - Located in Oguma Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kuwabara Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)}} - Located in Tō Town, Mizunami City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mototsu)|ja|八剱神社 (本巣市)}} - Located in Haruchika, {{ill|Mototsu, Gifu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Wanochi)|ja|八剣神社 (輪之内町)}} - Located in Waji, {{ill|Yaotsu, Gifu|ja|八百津町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ginan)|ja|八剣神社 (岐南町)}} - Located in Shimoinjiki, {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|ja|岐南町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yōrō)|ja|八剣神社 (養老町)}} - Located in Shimokasa, {{ill|Yōrō, Gifu|ja|養老町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Atsuta Shrine)|ja|八剣宮}} - Located in Jingu, {{ill|Atsuta Ward|ja|熱田区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, Aichi Prefecture. Located in Nonami, {{ill|Tenpaku Ward|ja|天白区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|八剱神社 (岡崎市千万町町)}} - Located in Senmanchō-chō, Okazaki, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kisogawa Town, Ichinomiya)|ja|八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)}} - Located in Kiso River Town, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ja|一宮市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sarayashiki)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)}} - Located in Sarayashiki, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tadokoro)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市田所)}} - Located in Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Higashiura)|ja|八劔神社 (東浦町)}} - Located in Morioka, {{ill|Higashiura, Aichi|ja|東浦町}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine and Shinmei Shrine|ja|八劔神社・神明社}} - Located in Meiji, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Iwakura)|ja|八剱神社 (岩倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|ja|岩倉市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyoyama)|ja|八剱神社 (豊山町)}} - revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - Located in Minamikawa, Ashitaka Town, {{ill|Hashima, Gifu|ja|羽島市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Oguma Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)}} - Located in Oguma Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kuwabara Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)}} - Located in Tō Town, Mizunami City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mototsu)|ja|八剱神社 (本巣市)}} - Located in Haruchika, {{ill|Mototsu, Gifu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Wanochi)|ja|八剣神社 (輪之内町)}} - Located in Waji, {{ill|Yaotsu, Gifu|ja|八百津町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ginan)|ja|八剣神社 (岐南町)}} - Located in Shimoinjiki, {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|ja|岐南町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yōrō)|ja|八剣神社 (養老町)}} - Located in Shimokasa, {{ill|Yōrō, Gifu|ja|養老町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Atsuta Shrine)|ja|八剣宮}} - Located in Jingu, {{ill|Atsuta Ward|ja|熱田区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, Aichi Prefecture. A subsidiary of {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|ja|熱田神宮}}. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)}} - Located in Ōmori, {{ill|Moriyama Ward|ja|守山区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenpaku, Nonami)|ja|八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)}} - Located in Nonami, {{ill|Tenpaku Ward|ja|天白区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|八剱神社 (岡崎市千万町町)}} - Located in Senmanchō-chō, Okazaki, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kisogawa Town, Ichinomiya)|ja|八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)}} - Located in Kiso River Town, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ja|一宮市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sarayashiki)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)}} - Located in Sarayashiki, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tadokoro)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市田所)}} - Located in Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Higashiura)|ja|八劔神社 (東浦町)}} - Located in Morioka, {{ill|Higashiura, Aichi|ja|東浦町}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine and Shinmei Shrine|ja|八劔神社・神明社}} - Located in Sakushima, {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Asano)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市浅野)}} - Located in Asano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Kamisobue)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市上祖父江)}} - Located in Kamisobue, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sebe)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市瀬部)}} - Located in Sebe, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tokinoshima)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市時之島)}} - Located in Tokinoshima, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Togari)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市萩原町戸苅)}} - Located in Togari, Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Meiji)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市明地)}} - Located in Meiji, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Iwakura)|ja|八剱神社 (岩倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|ja|岩倉市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyoyama)|ja|八剱神社 (豊山町)}} - Located in Kida, {{ill|Ama, Aichi|ja|あま市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|八劔社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in Hanada Town, {{ill|Toyohashi|ja|豊橋市}}, Aichi Prefecture.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - Located in Kaminoho, Seki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shimoishi Town, Toki)|ja|八劍神社 (土岐市下石町)}} - Located in Shimoishi Town, {{ill|Toki, Gifu|ja|土岐市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tsumagi Town, Toki)|ja|八剱神社 (土岐市妻木町)}} - Located in Tsukika, Tsumagi Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hida Town, Toki)|ja|八劔神社 (土岐市肥田町)}} - Located in Hida Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamikawa, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市足近町南之川)}} - Located in Minamikawa, Ashitaka Town, {{ill|Hashima, Gifu|ja|羽島市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Oguma Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)}} - Located in Oguma Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kuwabara Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)}} - Located in Tō Town, Mizunami City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mototsu)|ja|八剱神社 (本巣市)}} - Located in Haruchika, {{ill|Mototsu, Gifu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Wanochi)|ja|八剣神社 (輪之内町)}} - Located in Oyabu, {{ill|Wanochi, Gifu|ja|輪之内町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shirakawa Town)|ja|八剱神社 (白川町)}} - Located in Kamisami, {{ill|Shirakawa, Gifu|ja|白川町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yaotsu)|ja|八剱神社 (八百津町)}} - Located in Waji, {{ill|Yaotsu, Gifu|ja|八百津町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ginan)|ja|八剣神社 (岐南町)}} - Located in Shimoinjiki, {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|ja|岐南町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yōrō)|ja|八剣神社 (養老町)}} - Located in Shimokasa, {{ill|Yōrō, Gifu|ja|養老町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Atsuta Shrine)|ja|八剣宮}} - Located in Jingu, {{ill|Atsuta Ward|ja|熱田区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, Aichi Prefecture. A subsidiary of {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|ja|熱田神宮}}. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)}} - Located in Ōmori, {{ill|Moriyama Ward|ja|守山区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenpaku, Nonami)|ja|八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)}} - Located in Nonami, {{ill|Tenpaku Ward|ja|天白区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|八剱神社 (岡崎市千万町町)}} - Located in Senmanchō-chō, Okazaki, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kisogawa Town, Ichinomiya)|ja|八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)}} - Located in Kiso River Town, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ja|一宮市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sarayashiki)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)}} - Located in Sarayashiki, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tadokoro)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市田所)}} - Located in Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Higashiura)|ja|八劔神社 (東浦町)}} - Located in Morioka, {{ill|Higashiura, Aichi|ja|東浦町}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine and Shinmei Shrine|ja|八劔神社・神明社}} - Located in Sakushima, {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Asano)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市浅野)}} - Located in Asano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Kamisobue)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市上祖父江)}} - Located in Kamisobue, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sebe)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市瀬部)}} - Located in Sebe, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tokinoshima)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市時之島)}} - Located in Tokinoshima, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Togari)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市萩原町戸苅)}} - Located in Togari, Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Meiji)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市明地)}} - Located in Meiji, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Iwakura)|ja|八剱神社 (岩倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|ja|岩倉市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyoyama)|ja|八剱神社 (豊山町)}} - In the Edo period, it was called Yatsurugi Shrine. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - In the Edo period, it was called Yatsurugi Shrine. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hiroshima)|ja|八剣神社 (広島市)}} - Located in Hakushima Kyūken-chō, {{ill|Naka Ward, Hiroshima|ja|広島市中区}}, Hiroshima Prefecture.
== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - Located in Kaminoho, Seki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shimoishi Town, Toki)|ja|八劍神社 (土岐市下石町)}} - Located in Shimoishi Town, {{ill|Toki, Gifu|ja|土岐市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tsumagi Town, Toki)|ja|八剱神社 (土岐市妻木町)}} - Located in Tsukika, Tsumagi Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hida Town, Toki)|ja|八劔神社 (土岐市肥田町)}} - Located in Hida Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamikawa, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市足近町南之川)}} - Located in Minamikawa, Ashitaka Town, {{ill|Hashima, Gifu|ja|羽島市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Oguma Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)}} - Located in Oguma Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kuwabara Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)}} - Located in Kuwabara Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Takenohana Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市竹鼻町)}} - Located in Takenohana Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Horitsu Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市堀津町)}} - Located in Horitsu Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakoda, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Kitakoda Town, {{ill|Mizunami, Gifu|ja|瑞浪市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tō Town, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Tō Town, Mizunami City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mototsu)|ja|八剱神社 (本巣市)}} - Located in Haruchika, {{ill|Mototsu, Gifu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Wanochi)|ja|八剣神社 (輪之内町)}} - Located in Oyabu, {{ill|Wanochi, Gifu|ja|輪之内町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shirakawa Town)|ja|八剱神社 (白川町)}} - Located in Kamisami, {{ill|Shirakawa, Gifu|ja|白川町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yaotsu)|ja|八剱神社 (八百津町)}} - Located in Waji, {{ill|Yaotsu, Gifu|ja|八百津町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ginan)|ja|八剣神社 (岐南町)}} - Located in Shimoinjiki, {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|ja|岐南町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yōrō)|ja|八剣神社 (養老町)}} - Located in Shimokasa, {{ill|Yōrō, Gifu|ja|養老町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Atsuta Shrine)|ja|八剣宮}} - Located in Jingu, {{ill|Atsuta Ward|ja|熱田区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, Aichi Prefecture. A subsidiary of {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|ja|熱田神宮}}. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)}} - Located in Ōmori, {{ill|Moriyama Ward|ja|守山区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenpaku, Nonami)|ja|八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)}} - Located in Nonami, {{ill|Tenpaku Ward|ja|天白区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|八剱神社 (岡崎市千万町町)}} - Located in Senmanchō-chō, Okazaki, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kisogawa Town, Ichinomiya)|ja|八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)}} - Located in Kiso River Town, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ja|一宮市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sarayashiki)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)}} - Located in Sarayashiki, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tadokoro)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市田所)}} - Located in Tadokoro, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tamano)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市玉野)}} - Located in Tamano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Hagiwara)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市萩原町萩原)}} - Located in Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Higashiura)|ja|八劔神社 (東浦町)}} - Located in Morioka, {{ill|Higashiura, Aichi|ja|東浦町}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine and Shinmei Shrine|ja|八劔神社・神明社}} - Located in Sakushima, {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Asano)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市浅野)}} - Located in Asano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Kamisobue)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市上祖父江)}} - Located in Kamisobue, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sebe)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市瀬部)}} - Located in Sebe, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tokinoshima)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市時之島)}} - Located in Tokinoshima, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Togari)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市萩原町戸苅)}} - Located in Togari, Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Meiji)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市明地)}} - Located in Meiji, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Iwakura)|ja|八剱神社 (岩倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|ja|岩倉市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyoyama)|ja|八剱神社 (豊山町)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyoyama|ja|豊山町}}, Nishikasugai District, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine|ja|八劔神社 (蒲郡市)|simple|Yatsurugi Shrine}} - Located in Mitani Town, {{ill|Gamagōri, Aichi|ja|蒲郡市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kiyosu)|ja|八剱神社 (清須市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kiyosu|ja|清須市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chiryū)|ja|八剱社 (知立市)}} - Located in Kamishigehara, {{ill|Chiryū|ja|知立市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ama)|ja|八劔社 (あま市)}} - Located in Kida, {{ill|Ama, Aichi|ja|あま市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|八劔社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in Hanada Town, {{ill|Toyohashi|ja|豊橋市}}, Aichi Prefecture.
== Kinki Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Osaka)|ja|八劔神社 (大阪市)}} - Located in Shiginohigashi, {{ill|Jōtō Ward|ja|城東区}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture.<ref>[http://www.880.jp 八劔神社]</ref> * {{ill|Ajihayao Shrine|ja|阿遅速雄神社}} - Located in Hanatenhigashi, {{ill|Tsurumi Ward|ja|鶴見区}}, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture. In the Edo period, it was called Yatsurugi Shrine. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hiroshima)|ja|八剣神社 (広島市)}} - Located in Hakushima Kyūken-chō, {{ill|Naka Ward, Hiroshima|ja|広島市中区}}, Hiroshima Prefecture.
== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture.
