revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - Located in Kaminoho, Seki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shimoishi Town, Toki)|ja|八劍神社 (土岐市下石町)}} - Located in Shimoishi Town, {{ill|Toki, Gifu|ja|土岐市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tsumagi Town, Toki)|ja|八剱神社 (土岐市妻木町)}} - Located in Tsukika, Tsumagi Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hida Town, Toki)|ja|八劔神社 (土岐市肥田町)}} - Located in Hida Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamikawa, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市足近町南之川)}} - Located in Minamikawa, Ashitaka Town, {{ill|Hashima, Gifu|ja|羽島市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Oguma Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)}} - Located in Oguma Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kuwabara Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)}} - Located in Kuwabara Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Takenohana Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市竹鼻町)}} - Located in Takenohana Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Horitsu Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市堀津町)}} - Located in Horitsu Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakoda, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Kitakoda Town, {{ill|Mizunami, Gifu|ja|瑞浪市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tō Town, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Tō Town, Mizunami City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mototsu)|ja|八剱神社 (本巣市)}} - Located in Haruchika, {{ill|Mototsu, Gifu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Wanochi)|ja|八剣神社 (輪之内町)}} - Located in Oyabu, {{ill|Wanochi, Gifu|ja|輪之内町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shirakawa Town)|ja|八剱神社 (白川町)}} - Located in Kamisami, {{ill|Shirakawa, Gifu|ja|白川町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yaotsu)|ja|八剱神社 (八百津町)}} - Located in Waji, {{ill|Yaotsu, Gifu|ja|八百津町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ginan)|ja|八剣神社 (岐南町)}} - Located in Shimoinjiki, {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|ja|岐南町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yōrō)|ja|八剣神社 (養老町)}} - Located in Shimokasa, {{ill|Yōrō, Gifu|ja|養老町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Atsuta Shrine)|ja|八剣宮}} - Located in Jingu, {{ill|Atsuta Ward|ja|熱田区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, Aichi Prefecture. A subsidiary of {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|ja|熱田神宮}}. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)}} - Located in Ōmori, {{ill|Moriyama Ward|ja|守山区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenpaku, Nonami)|ja|八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)}} - Located in Nonami, {{ill|Tenpaku Ward|ja|天白区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|八剱神社 (岡崎市千万町町)}} - Located in Senmanchō-chō, Okazaki, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kisogawa Town, Ichinomiya)|ja|八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)}} - Located in Kiso River Town, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ja|一宮市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sarayashiki)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)}} - Located in Sarayashiki, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tadokoro)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市田所)}} - Located in Tadokoro, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tamano)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市玉野)}} - Located in Tamano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Hagiwara)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市萩原町萩原)}} - Located in Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Higashiura)|ja|八劔神社 (東浦町)}} - Located in Morioka, {{ill|Higashiura, Aichi|ja|東浦町}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine and Shinmei Shrine|ja|八劔神社・神明社}} - Located in Sakushima, {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Asano)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市浅野)}} - Located in Asano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Kamisobue)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市上祖父江)}} - Located in Kamisobue, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sebe)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市瀬部)}} - Located in Sebe, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tokinoshima)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市時之島)}} - Located in Tokinoshima, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Togari)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市萩原町戸苅)}} - Located in Togari, Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Meiji)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市明地)}} - Located in Meiji, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Iwakura)|ja|八剱神社 (岩倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|ja|岩倉市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyoyama)|ja|八剱神社 (豊山町)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyoyama|ja|豊山町}}, Nishikasugai District, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine|ja|八劔神社 (蒲郡市)|simple|Yatsurugi Shrine}} - Located in Mitani Town, {{ill|Gamagōri, Aichi|ja|蒲郡市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kiyosu)|ja|八剱神社 (清須市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kiyosu|ja|清須市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chiryū)|ja|八剱社 (知立市)}} - Located in Kamishigehara, {{ill|Chiryū|ja|知立市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ama)|ja|八劔社 (あま市)}} - Located in Kida, {{ill|Ama, Aichi|ja|あま市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|八劔社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in Hanada Town, {{ill|Toyohashi|ja|豊橋市}}, Aichi Prefecture.
== Kinki Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Osaka)|ja|八劔神社 (大阪市)}} - Located in Shiginohigashi, {{ill|Jōtō Ward|ja|城東区}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture.<ref>[http://www.880.jp 八劔神社]</ref> * {{ill|Ajihayao Shrine|ja|阿遅速雄神社}} - Located in Hanatenhigashi, {{ill|Tsurumi Ward|ja|鶴見区}}, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture. In the Edo period, it was called Yatsurugi Shrine. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - Located in Kaminoho, Seki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shimoishi Town, Toki)|ja|八劍神社 (土岐市下石町)}} - Located in Shimoishi Town, {{ill|Toki, Gifu|ja|土岐市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tsumagi Town, Toki)|ja|八剱神社 (土岐市妻木町)}} - Located in Tsukika, Tsumagi Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hida Town, Toki)|ja|八劔神社 (土岐市肥田町)}} - Located in Hida Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamikawa, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市足近町南之川)}} - Located in Minamikawa, Ashitaka Town, {{ill|Hashima, Gifu|ja|羽島市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Oguma Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)}} - Located in Oguma Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kuwabara Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)}} - Located in Kuwabara Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Takenohana Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市竹鼻町)}} - Located in Takenohana Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Horitsu Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市堀津町)}} - Located in Horitsu Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakoda, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Kitakoda Town, {{ill|Mizunami, Gifu|ja|瑞浪市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tō Town, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Tō Town, Mizunami City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mototsu)|ja|八剱神社 (本巣市)}} - Located in Haruchika, {{ill|Mototsu, Gifu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Wanochi)|ja|八剣神社 (輪之内町)}} - Located in Oyabu, {{ill|Wanochi, Gifu|ja|輪之内町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shirakawa Town)|ja|八剱神社 (白川町)}} - Located in Kamisami, {{ill|Shirakawa, Gifu|ja|白川町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yaotsu)|ja|八剱神社 (八百津町)}} - Located in Waji, {{ill|Yaotsu, Gifu|ja|八百津町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ginan)|ja|八剣神社 (岐南町)}} - Located in Shimoinjiki, {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|ja|岐南町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yōrō)|ja|八剣神社 (養老町)}} - Located in Shimokasa, {{ill|Yōrō, Gifu|ja|養老町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Atsuta Shrine)|ja|八剣宮}} - Located in Jingu, {{ill|Atsuta Ward|ja|熱田区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, Aichi Prefecture. A subsidiary of {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|ja|熱田神宮}}. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)}} - Located in Ōmori, {{ill|Moriyama Ward|ja|守山区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenpaku, Nonami)|ja|八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)}} - Located in Nonami, {{ill|Tenpaku Ward|ja|天白区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|八剱神社 (岡崎市千万町町)}} - Located in Senmanchō-chō, Okazaki, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kisogawa Town, Ichinomiya)|ja|八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)}} - Located in Kiso River Town, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ja|一宮市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sarayashiki)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)}} - Located in Sarayashiki, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tadokoro)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市田所)}} - Located in Tadokoro, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tamano)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市玉野)}} - Located in Tamano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Hagiwara)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市萩原町萩原)}} - Located in Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Higashiura)|ja|八劔神社 (東浦町)}} - Located in Morioka, {{ill|Higashiura, Aichi|ja|東浦町}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine and Shinmei Shrine|ja|八劔神社・神明社}} - Located in Sakushima, {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Asano)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市浅野)}} - Located in Asano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Kamisobue)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市上祖父江)}} - Located in Kamisobue, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sebe)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市瀬部)}} - Located in Sebe, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tokinoshima)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市時之島)}} - Located in Tokinoshima, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Togari)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市萩原町戸苅)}} - Located in Togari, Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Meiji)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市明地)}} - Located in Meiji, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Iwakura)|ja|八剱神社 (岩倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|ja|岩倉市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyoyama)|ja|八剱神社 (豊山町)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyoyama|ja|豊山町}}, Nishikasugai District, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine|ja|八劔神社 (蒲郡市)|simple|Yatsurugi Shrine}} - Located in Mitani Town, {{ill|Gamagōri, Aichi|ja|蒲郡市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kiyosu)|ja|八剱神社 (清須市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kiyosu|ja|清須市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chiryū)|ja|八剱社 (知立市)}} - Located in Kamishigehara, {{ill|Chiryū|ja|知立市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ama)|ja|八劔社 (あま市)}} - Located in Kida, {{ill|Ama, Aichi|ja|あま市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|八劔社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in Hanada Town, {{ill|Toyohashi|ja|豊橋市}}, Aichi Prefecture.
== Kinki Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Osaka)|ja|八劔神社 (大阪市)}} - Located in Shiginohigashi, {{ill|Jōtō Ward|ja|城東区}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture.<ref>[http://www.880.jp 八劔神社]</ref> * {{ill|Ajihayao Shrine|ja|阿遅速雄神社}} - Located in Hanatenhigashi, {{ill|Tsurumi Ward|ja|鶴見区}}, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture. In the Edo period, it was called Yatsurugi Shrine. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hiroshima)|ja|八剣神社 (広島市)}} - Located in Hakushima Kyūken-chō, {{ill|Naka Ward, Hiroshima|ja|広島市中区}}, Hiroshima Prefecture.
== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - Located in Kaminoho, Seki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shimoishi Town, Toki)|ja|八劍神社 (土岐市下石町)}} - Located in Shimoishi Town, {{ill|Toki, Gifu|ja|土岐市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tsumagi Town, Toki)|ja|八剱神社 (土岐市妻木町)}} - Located in Tsukika, Tsumagi Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hida Town, Toki)|ja|八劔神社 (土岐市肥田町)}} - Located in Hida Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamikawa, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市足近町南之川)}} - Located in Minamikawa, Ashitaka Town, {{ill|Hashima, Gifu|ja|羽島市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Oguma Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)}} - Located in Oguma Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kuwabara Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)}} - Located in Kuwabara Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Takenohana Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市竹鼻町)}} - Located in Takenohana Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Horitsu Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市堀津町)}} - Located in Horitsu Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakoda, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Kitakoda Town, {{ill|Mizunami, Gifu|ja|瑞浪市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tō Town, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Tō Town, Mizunami City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mototsu)|ja|八剱神社 (本巣市)}} - Located in Haruchika, {{ill|Mototsu, Gifu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Wanochi)|ja|八剣神社 (輪之内町)}} - Located in Oyabu, {{ill|Wanochi, Gifu|ja|輪之内町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shirakawa Town)|ja|八剱神社 (白川町)}} - Located in Kamisami, {{ill|Shirakawa, Gifu|ja|白川町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yaotsu)|ja|八剱神社 (八百津町)}} - Located in Waji, {{ill|Yaotsu, Gifu|ja|八百津町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ginan)|ja|八剣神社 (岐南町)}} - Located in Shimoinjiki, {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|ja|岐南町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yōrō)|ja|八剣神社 (養老町)}} - Located in Shimokasa, {{ill|Yōrō, Gifu|ja|養老町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Atsuta Shrine)|ja|八剣宮}} - Located in Jingu, {{ill|Atsuta Ward|ja|熱田区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, Aichi Prefecture. A subsidiary of {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|ja|熱田神宮}}. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)}} - Located in Ōmori, {{ill|Moriyama Ward|ja|守山区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenpaku, Nonami)|ja|八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)}} - Located in Nonami, {{ill|Tenpaku Ward|ja|天白区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|八剱神社 (岡崎市千万町町)}} - Located in Senmanchō-chō, Okazaki, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kisogawa Town, Ichinomiya)|ja|八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)}} - Located in Kiso River Town, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ja|一宮市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sarayashiki)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)}} - Located in Sarayashiki, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tadokoro)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市田所)}} - Located in Tadokoro, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tamano)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市玉野)}} - Located in Tamano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Hagiwara)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市萩原町萩原)}} - Located in Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Higashiura)|ja|八劔神社 (東浦町)}} - Located in Morioka, {{ill|Higashiura, Aichi|ja|東浦町}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine and Shinmei Shrine|ja|八劔神社・神明社}} - Located in Sakushima, {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Asano)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市浅野)}} - Located in Asano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Kamisobue)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市上祖父江)}} - Located in Kamisobue, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sebe)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市瀬部)}} - Located in Sebe, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tokinoshima)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市時之島)}} - Located in Tokinoshima, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Togari)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市萩原町戸苅)}} - Located in Togari, Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Meiji)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市明地)}} - Located in Meiji, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Iwakura)|ja|八剱神社 (岩倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|ja|岩倉市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyoyama)|ja|八剱神社 (豊山町)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyoyama|ja|豊山町}}, Nishikasugai District, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine|ja|八劔神社 (蒲郡市)|simple|Yatsurugi Shrine}} - Located in Mitani Town, {{ill|Gamagōri, Aichi|ja|蒲郡市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kiyosu)|ja|八剱神社 (清須市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kiyosu|ja|清須市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chiryū)|ja|八剱社 (知立市)}} - Located in Kamishigehara, {{ill|Chiryū|ja|知立市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ama)|ja|八劔社 (あま市)}} - Located in Kida, {{ill|Ama, Aichi|ja|あま市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|八劔社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in Hanada Town, {{ill|Toyohashi|ja|豊橋市}}, Aichi Prefecture.
== Kinki Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Osaka)|ja|八劔神社 (大阪市)}} - Located in Shiginohigashi, {{ill|Jōtō Ward|ja|城東区}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture.<ref>[http://www.880.jp 八劔神社]</ref> * {{ill|Ajihayao Shrine|ja|阿遅速雄神社}} - Located in Hanatenhigashi, {{ill|Tsurumi Ward|ja|鶴見区}}, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture. In the Edo period, it was called Yatsurugi Shrine. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hiroshima)|ja|八剣神社 (広島市)}} - Located in Hakushima Kyūken-chō, {{ill|Naka Ward, Hiroshima|ja|広島市中区}}, Hiroshima Prefecture.
== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture.== See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}} {{曖昧さ回避}}

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.

== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}} {{曖昧さ回避}}

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - Located in Kiso River Town, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ja|一宮市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sarayashiki)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)}} - Located in Sarayashiki, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tadokoro)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市田所)}} - revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)}} - Located in Kaminoho, Seki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shimoishi Town, Toki)|ja|八劍神社 (土岐市下石町)}} - Located in Shimoishi Town, {{ill|Toki, Gifu|ja|土岐市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tsumagi Town, Toki)|ja|八剱神社 (土岐市妻木町)}} - Located in Tsukika, Tsumagi Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hida Town, Toki)|ja|八劔神社 (土岐市肥田町)}} - Located in Hida Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamikawa, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市足近町南之川)}} - Located in Minamikawa, Ashitaka Town, {{ill|Hashima, Gifu|ja|羽島市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Oguma Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)}} - Located in Oguma Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kuwabara Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)}} - Located in Kuwabara Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Takenohana Town, Hashima)|ja|八剱神社 (羽島市竹鼻町)}} - Located in Takenohana Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Horitsu Town, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市堀津町)}} - Located in Horitsu Town, Hashima City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakoda, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Kitakoda Town, {{ill|Mizunami, Gifu|ja|瑞浪市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tō Town, Mizunami)|ja|八剣神社 (瑞浪市)}} - Located in Tō Town, Mizunami City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mototsu)|ja|八剱神社 (本巣市)}} - Located in Haruchika, {{ill|Mototsu, Gifu|ja|本巣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Wanochi)|ja|八剣神社 (輪之内町)}} - Located in Oyabu, {{ill|Wanochi, Gifu|ja|輪之内町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shirakawa Town)|ja|八剱神社 (白川町)}} - Located in Kamisami, {{ill|Shirakawa, Gifu|ja|白川町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yaotsu)|ja|八剱神社 (八百津町)}} - Located in Waji, {{ill|Yaotsu, Gifu|ja|八百津町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ginan)|ja|八剣神社 (岐南町)}} - Located in Shimoinjiki, {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|ja|岐南町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yōrō)|ja|八剣神社 (養老町)}} - Located in Shimokasa, {{ill|Yōrō, Gifu|ja|養老町}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Atsuta Shrine)|ja|八剣宮}} - Located in Jingu, {{ill|Atsuta Ward|ja|熱田区}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市}}, Aichi Prefecture. A subsidiary of {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|ja|熱田神宮}}. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)}} - Located in Ōmori, {{ill|Moriyama Ward|ja|守山区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenpaku, Nonami)|ja|八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)}} - Located in Nonami, {{ill|Tenpaku Ward|ja|天白区}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Okazaki)|ja|八剱神社 (岡崎市千万町町)}} - Located in Senmanchō-chō, Okazaki, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kisogawa Town, Ichinomiya)|ja|八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)}} - Located in Kiso River Town, {{ill|Ichinomiya, Aichi|ja|一宮市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sarayashiki)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)}} - Located in Sarayashiki, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tadokoro)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市田所)}} - Located in Tadokoro, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tamano)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市玉野)}} - Located in Tamano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Hagiwara)|ja|八劔神社 (一宮市萩原町萩原)}} - Located in Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Higashiura)|ja|八劔神社 (東浦町)}} - Located in Morioka, {{ill|Higashiura, Aichi|ja|東浦町}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine and Shinmei Shrine|ja|八劔神社・神明社}} - Located in Sakushima, {{ill|Nishio|ja|西尾市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Asano)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市浅野)}} - Located in Asano, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Kamisobue)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市上祖父江)}} - Located in Kamisobue, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Sebe)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市瀬部)}} - Located in Sebe, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Tokinoshima)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市時之島)}} - Located in Tokinoshima, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Togari)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市萩原町戸苅)}} - Located in Togari, Hagiwara Town, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ichinomiya Meiji)|ja|八劔社 (一宮市明地)}} - Located in Meiji, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Iwakura)|ja|八剱神社 (岩倉市)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|ja|岩倉市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyoyama)|ja|八剱神社 (豊山町)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyoyama|ja|豊山町}}, Nishikasugai District, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine|ja|八劔神社 (蒲郡市)|simple|Yatsurugi Shrine}} - Located in Mitani Town, {{ill|Gamagōri, Aichi|ja|蒲郡市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kiyosu)|ja|八剱神社 (清須市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kiyosu|ja|清須市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chiryū)|ja|八剱社 (知立市)}} - Located in Kamishigehara, {{ill|Chiryū|ja|知立市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ama)|ja|八劔社 (あま市)}} - Located in Kida, {{ill|Ama, Aichi|ja|あま市}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|八劔社 (豊橋市)}} - Located in Hanada Town, {{ill|Toyohashi|ja|豊橋市}}, Aichi Prefecture.
== Kinki Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Osaka)|ja|八劔神社 (大阪市)}} - Located in Shiginohigashi, {{ill|Jōtō Ward|ja|城東区}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市}}, Osaka Prefecture.<ref>[http://www.880.jp 八劔神社]</ref> * {{ill|Ajihayao Shrine|ja|阿遅速雄神社}} - Located in Hanatenhigashi, {{ill|Tsurumi Ward|ja|鶴見区}}, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture. In the Edo period, it was called Yatsurugi Shrine. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hiroshima)|ja|八剣神社 (広島市)}} - Located in Hakushima Kyūken-chō, {{ill|Naka Ward, Hiroshima|ja|広島市中区}}, Hiroshima Prefecture.
== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市}}, Nagasaki Prefecture. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}} {{曖昧さ回避}}

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)}} - revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|12=draft}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|12=draft}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|12=draft}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|12=draft}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|12=draft}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|12=draft}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|12=draft}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|12=draft}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|12=draft}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|12=draft}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|12=draft}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|12=draft}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|12=draft}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|12=draft}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|12=draft}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.

== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社|12=draft}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社|12=draft}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社|12=draft}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町|12=draft}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社|12=draft}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町|12=draft}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社|12=draft}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|12=draft}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|12=draft}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|12=draft}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo.
== Chūbu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|ja|八剣神社 (諏訪市)|lt=Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Kowata)|12=draft}} - Located in Kowata, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|ja|諏訪市|12=draft}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Suwa City, Toyoda)|ja|八劍神社 (諏訪市)|12=draft}} - Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)|12=draft}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町|12=draft}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)|12=draft}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市|12=draft}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)|12=draft}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)|12=draft}} - Located in Shimo Tara, Kamiishizu Town, Ōgaki, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaizu Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八剣神社 (海津市海津町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hihara, Kaizu Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hirata Town, Kaizu City)|ja|八劔神社 (海津市平田町)|12=draft}} - Located in Oka, Hirata Town, Kaizu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kani)|ja|八剱神社 (可児市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kukuri, {{ill|Kani, Gifu|ja|可児市|12=draft}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Gujo)|ja|八剣神社 (郡上市)|12=draft}} - Located in Mito, Minami Town, {{ill|Gujo, Gifu|ja|郡上市|12=draft}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nishikanno, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市西神野)|12=draft}} - Located in Nishikanno, {{ill|Seki, Gifu|ja|関市|12=draft}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kaminoho, Seki)|ja|八剱神社 (関市上之保)|12=draft}} - Located in Kaminoho, Seki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Shimoishi Town, Toki)|ja|八劍神社 (土岐市下石町)|12=draft}} - Located in Shimoishi Town, {{ill|Toki, Gifu|ja|土岐市|12=draft}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tsumagi Town, Toki)|ja|八剱神社 (土岐市妻木町)|12=draft}} - Located in Tsukika, Tsumagi Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hida Town, Toki)|ja|八劔神社 (土岐市肥田町)|12=draft}} - Located in Hida Town, Toki City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamikawa, Hashima)|ja|八剣神社 (羽島市足近町南之川)|12=draft}} - Located in Waji, {{ill|Yaotsu, Gifu|ja|八百津町|12=draft}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ginan)|ja|八剣神社 (岐南町)|12=draft}} - Located in Shimoinjiki, {{ill|Ginan, Gifu|ja|岐南町|12=draft}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yōrō)|ja|八剣神社 (養老町)|12=draft}} - Located in Shimokasa, {{ill|Yōrō, Gifu|ja|養老町|12=draft}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Atsuta Shrine)|ja|八剣宮|12=draft}} - Located in Jingu, {{ill|Atsuta Ward|ja|熱田区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nagoya|ja|名古屋市|12=draft}}, Aichi Prefecture. A subsidiary of {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|ja|熱田神宮|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Moriyama)|ja|八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)|12=draft}} - Located in Ōmori, {{ill|Moriyama Ward|ja|守山区|12=draft}}, Nagoya, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenpaku, Nonami)|ja|八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)|12=draft}} - revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|12=draft}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|12=draft}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|12=draft}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo.

Located in Toyoda, Suwa, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagiso)|ja|八劔神社 (南木曽町)|12=draft}} - Located in Kakizore, {{ill|Nagiso, Nagano|ja|南木曽町|12=draft}}, Nagano Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Imojima, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)|12=draft}} - Located in Imojima, {{ill|Gifu, Gifu|ja|岐阜市|12=draft}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Naka, Gifu)|ja|八剣神社 (岐阜市中)|12=draft}} - Located in Naka, Gifu City, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|八剣神社 (大垣市)|12=draft}} - == Kinki Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Osaka)|ja|八劔神社 (大阪市)|12=draft}} - Located in Shiginohigashi, {{ill|Jōtō Ward|ja|城東区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture.<ref>[http://www.880.jp 八劔神社]</ref> * {{ill|Ajihayao Shrine|ja|阿遅速雄神社|12=draft}} - Located in Hanatenhigashi, {{ill|Tsurumi Ward|ja|鶴見区|12=draft}}, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture. In the Edo period, it was called Yatsurugi Shrine. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)|12=draft}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市|12=draft}}, Nara Prefecture.

Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社|12=draft}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡|12=draft}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社|12=draft}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}} {{曖昧さ回避}}

These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|12=draft}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|12=draft}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|12=draft}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=draft}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=draft}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|12=draft}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|12=draft}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|12=draft}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|12=draft}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|12=draft}}, Tokyo.

Located in Meiji, Ichinomiya City, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Iwakura)|ja|八剱神社 (岩倉市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Iwakura, Aichi|ja|岩倉市|12=draft}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyoyama)|ja|八剱神社 (豊山町)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Toyoyama|ja|豊山町|12=draft}}, Nishikasugai District, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine|ja|八劔神社 (蒲郡市)|simple|Yatsurugi Shrine|12=draft}} - Located in Mitani Town, {{ill|Gamagōri, Aichi|ja|蒲郡市|12=draft}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kiyosu)|ja|八剱神社 (清須市)|12=draft}} - Located in {{ill|Kiyosu|ja|清須市|12=draft}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chiryū)|ja|八剱社 (知立市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kamishigehara, {{ill|Chiryū|ja|知立市|12=draft}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ama)|ja|八劔社 (あま市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kida, {{ill|Ama, Aichi|ja|あま市|12=draft}}, Aichi Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Toyohashi)|ja|八劔社 (豊橋市)|12=draft}} - Located in Hanada Town, {{ill|Toyohashi|ja|豊橋市|12=draft}}, Aichi Prefecture.
== Kinki Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Osaka)|ja|八劔神社 (大阪市)|12=draft}} - Located in Shiginohigashi, {{ill|Jōtō Ward|ja|城東区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Osaka|ja|大阪市|12=draft}}, Osaka Prefecture.<ref>[http://www.880.jp 八劔神社]</ref> * {{ill|Ajihayao Shrine|ja|阿遅速雄神社|12=draft}} - Located in Hanatenhigashi, {{ill|Tsurumi Ward|ja|鶴見区|12=draft}}, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture. In the Edo period, it was called Yatsurugi Shrine. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Tenri)|ja|八剱神社 (天理市)|12=draft}} - Located in Taishō Town, {{ill|Tenri, Nara|ja|天理市|12=draft}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Chūgoku Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Hiroshima)|ja|八剣神社 (広島市)|12=draft}} - Located in Hakushima Kyūken-chō, {{ill|Naka Ward, Hiroshima|ja|広島市中区|12=draft}}, Hiroshima Prefecture.
== Kyushu Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Koshiki)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Koshiki, Wakamatsu-ku, {{ill|Kitakyushu|ja|北九州市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Wakamataku Shioya)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Shioya, Wakamatsu-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kitakyushu, Yahatanishi Honjō)|ja|八剱神社|12=draft}} - Located in Honjō, Yahatanishi-ku, Kitakyushu, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Fukiwatari)|ja|八剱神社|12=draft}} - Located in Fukiwatari, Onga Town, {{ill|Onga District, Fukuoka|ja|遠賀郡|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Onga District, Koga)|ja|八剱神社|12=draft}} - Located in Koga, Onga Town, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Mizumaki)|ja|八劔神社|12=draft}} - Located in Tachiashiki, {{ill|Mizumaki, Fukuoka|ja|水巻町|12=draft}}, Onga District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate District)|ja|八剱神社|12=draft}} - Located in Komaki, {{ill|Kurate Town|ja|鞍手町|12=draft}}, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nakama)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Nakazoko, Nakama City, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Kurate Town)|ja|八剱神社|12=draft}} - Located in Nakayama, Kurate Town, Kurate District, Fukuoka Prefecture. Dedicated to Susanoo-no-Mikoto, Yamato Takeru, and Miya Sumehime. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yanagawa)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Higashi Kamijō Town, Nakashima, Yamato Town, {{ill|Yanagawa, Fukuoka|ja|柳川市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Miyama)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Shimo Kusuda, Takada Town, {{ill|Miyama, Fukuoka|ja|みやま市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Yame)|ja|八剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Tanikawa, Tachibana Town, {{ill|Yame, Fukuoka|ja|八女市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Ōmuta)|ja|彌剣神社|12=draft}} - Located in Honmachi, {{ill|Ōmuta|ja|大牟田市|12=draft}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Minamiogata, Kumamoto)|ja|八釼神社|12=draft}} - Located in Sekimachi, Minamiogata Town, {{ill|Tamana District, Kumamoto|ja|玉名郡|12=draft}}, Kumamoto Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Nagasaki)|ja|八釼神社|12=draft}} - Located in Higashikojima Town, {{ill|Nagasaki|ja|長崎市|12=draft}}, Nagasaki Prefecture. == See Also == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}} {{曖昧さ回避}}
