revision.text:
'''八剣'''（'''剱'''・'''劔'''・'''劍'''）'''神社'''（はっけんじんじゃ / やつるぎじんじゃ）、'''八剣'''（'''劔'''）'''社'''（はっけんしゃ / やつるぎしゃ）は[[神社]]。その名の通り8本の剣を神体あるいは祭神とするもののほか、[[素戔嗚尊]]、[[大国主神]]、[[日本武尊]]を祭神とするものなど様々ある。
== 関東地方 == * [[八剱八幡神社]] - 千葉県木更津市[[富士見 (木更津市)|富士見]]鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (習志野市)]] - 千葉県[[習志野市]][[鷺沼 (習志野市)|鷺沼]]鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (葛飾区)]] - 東京都葛飾区[[奥戸]]鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (調布市)]] - 東京都[[調布市]][[菊野台]]鎮座
== 中部地方 == * [[八剣神社_(諏訪市)|八劔神社 (諏訪市)]] - 長野県諏訪市小和田鎮座 * [[八劍神社 (諏訪市)]] - 長野県諏訪市豊田鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (南木曽町)]] - 長野県南木曽町柿其鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (岐阜市芋島)]] - [[岐阜県]]岐阜市芋島鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (岐阜市中)]] - 岐阜県岐阜市中鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (大垣市)]] - 岐阜県大垣市上石津町下多良鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (海津市海津町)]] - 岐阜県海津市海津町日原鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (海津市平田町)]] - 岐阜県海津市平田町岡鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (可児市)]] - 岐阜県可児市久々利鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (郡上市)]] - 岐阜県郡上市美並町三戸鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (関市西神野)]] - 岐阜県関市西神野鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (関市上之保)]] - 岐阜県関市上之保鎮座 * [[八劍神社 (土岐市下石町)]] - 岐阜県土岐市下石町鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (土岐市妻木町)]] - 岐阜県土岐市妻木町掛花鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (土岐市肥田町)]] - 岐阜県土岐市肥田町肥田鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (羽島市足近町南之川)]] - 岐阜県羽島市足近町南之川鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (羽島市小熊町相田)]] - 岐阜県羽島市小熊町相田鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (羽島市桑原町八神)]] - 岐阜県羽島市桑原町八神鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (羽島市竹鼻町)]] - 岐阜県羽島市竹鼻町鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (羽島市堀津町)]] - 岐阜県羽島市堀津町鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (瑞浪市)]] - 岐阜県[[瑞浪市]]北小田町鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (瑞浪市)]] - 岐阜県瑞浪市[[陶町]]大川 * [[八剱神社 (本巣市)]] - 岐阜県本巣市春近鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (輪之内町)]] - 岐阜県安八郡輪之内町大藪鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (白川町)]] - 岐阜県加茂郡白川町上佐見鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (八百津町)]] - 岐阜県加茂郡八百津町和知鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (岐南町)]] - 岐阜県羽島郡岐南町下印食鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (養老町)]] - 岐阜県養老郡養老町下笠鎮座 * [[八剣宮]] - [[愛知県]][[名古屋市]][[熱田区]][[神宮 (名古屋市)|神宮]]鎮座。[[熱田神宮]][[熱田神宮#別宮・摂末社|別宮]] * [[八剣神社 (名古屋市守山区大森)]] - 愛知県名古屋市守山区大森鎮座 * [[八劔社 (名古屋市天白区野並)]] - 愛知県名古屋市天白区野並鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (岡崎市千万町町)]] - 愛知県岡崎市千万町町宮西鎮座 * [[八剣神社 (一宮市木曽川町)]] - 愛知県一宮市木曽川町外割田鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (一宮市更屋敷)]] - 愛知県一宮市更屋敷鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (一宮市田所)]] - 愛知県一宮市田所鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (一宮市玉野)]] - 愛知県一宮市玉野鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (一宮市萩原町萩原)]] - 愛知県一宮市萩原町萩原鎮座 * [[八劔神社 (東浦町)]] - 愛知県知多郡東浦町森岡鎮座 * [[八劔神社・神明社]] - 愛知県西尾市一色町佐久島鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市浅野)]] - 愛知県一宮市浅野鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市上祖父江)]] - 愛知県一宮市上祖父江鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市瀬部)]] - 愛知県一宮市瀬部鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市時之島)]] - 愛知県一宮市時之島鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市萩原町戸苅)]] - 愛知県一宮市萩原町戸苅鎮座 * [[八劔社 (一宮市明地)]] - 愛知県一宮市明地鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (岩倉市)]] - 愛知県[[岩倉市]]にある神社。 * [[八剱神社 (豊山町)]] - 愛知県西春日井郡豊山町 * [[八劔神社 (蒲郡市)]] - 愛知県蒲郡市三谷町鎮座 * [[八剱神社 (清須市)]] - [[愛知県]][[清須市]]に鎮座する神社。 * [[八剱社 (知立市)]] - 愛知県知立市上重原に鎮座する神社 * [[八劔社 (あま市)]] - 愛知県あま市木田鎮座 * [[八劔社 (豊橋市)]] - 愛知県豊橋市花田町に鎮座する神社
== 近畿地方 == * [[八劔神社 (大阪市)]] - [[大阪府]][[大阪市]][[城東区]][[鴫野東]]鎮座<ref>[http://www.880.jp 八劔神社]</ref> * [[阿遅速雄神社]] - 大阪府大阪市[[鶴見区 (大阪市)|鶴見区]][[放出東]]鎮座 江戸時代の頃は、八剣神社と称されていた。 * [[八剱神社 (天理市)]] - [[奈良県]][[天理市]]田井庄町鎮座
== 中国地方 == * [[八剣神社 (広島市)]] - 広島県広島市中区白島九軒町鎮座
== 九州地方 == * 八剣神社 - [[福岡県]]北九州市若松区小敷311 * 八剣神社 - 福岡県北九州市若松区塩屋3-15-17 * 八剱神社 - 福岡県北九州市八幡西区本城2-1-56 * 八剱神社 - 福岡県遠賀郡遠賀町広渡1726-1 * 八剱神社 - 福岡県遠賀郡遠賀町大字今古賀439 * 八劔神社 - 福岡県遠賀郡水巻町立屋敷3-13-30 * 八剱神社 - 福岡県[[鞍手郡]][[鞍手町]]小牧1324 * 八剣神社 - 福岡県中間市大字中底井野字八番柏492 * 八剱神社 - 福岡県鞍手郡鞍手町大字中山字尾山1588「素盞嗚尊、日本武尊、宮簀姫命」 * 八剣神社 - 福岡県柳川市大和町中島東上町662 * 八剣神社 - 福岡県みやま市高田町下楠田1775 * 八剣神社 - 福岡県八女市立花町谷川1673 * 彌剣神社 - 福岡県大牟田市本町4-10-17 * 八釼神社 - [[熊本県]]玉名郡南関町大字関町1500-1 * 八釼神社 - [[長崎県]]長崎市東小島町5−5
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

'''八剣'''（'''剱'''・'''劔'''・'''劍'''）'''神社'''（はっけんじんじゃ / やつるぎじんじゃ）、'''八剣'''（'''劔'''）'''社'''（はっけんしゃ / やつるぎしゃ）は[[神社]]。その名の通り8本の剣を神体あるいは祭神とするもののほか、[[素戔嗚尊]]、[[大国主神]]、[[日本武尊]]を祭神とするものなど様々ある。

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrines|qq=}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kisarazu|qq=}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|qq=}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Narashino|qq=}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|qq=}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsushika|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|qq=}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōfu|qq=}}, Tokyo.

<!--Yatsurugi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Yatsurugi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Yatsurugi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Yatsurugi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--note do not remove this category during translation--><!--Yatsurugi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Yatsurugi Shrine (disambiguation)--><!--Yatsurugi Shrine (disambiguation)-->

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrines|qq=}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrines|qq=}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=}}.
== Kantō Region == * {{ill|Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|ja|八剱八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsurugi Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Fujimi, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kisarazu|qq=}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|ja|八剱神社 (習志野市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsurugi Shrine (Narashino)|qq=}} - Located in Saginuma, {{ill|Narashino|ja|習志野市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Narashino|qq=}}, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|ja|八剣神社 (葛飾区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsurugi Shrine (Katsushika)|qq=}} - Located in Okudo, {{ill|Katsushika|ja|葛飾区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsushika|qq=}}, Tokyo. * {{ill|Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|ja|八剱神社 (調布市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsurugi Shrine (Chōfu)|qq=}} - Located in Kikunodai, {{ill|Chōfu|ja|調布市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōfu|qq=}}, Tokyo.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Wikidata entry [[d:" to "Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:"
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

revision.comment: v25: Convert interwiki links [[:en:...]] to {{ill}} templates
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11390593]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:30, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]]
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]]
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]]
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八剣神社]]
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.

revision.text:
'''Yatsurugi Shrines''' (八剣神社, also written as 剱神社, 劔神社, or 劍神社) also read as Yatsurugi Shrines refer to {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}}. These shrines often enshrine eight swords as sacred objects or deities, including {{ill|Susanoo|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo|13=User:Immanuelle/Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スサノオ}}, {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大国主}}, and {{ill|Yamato Takeru|ja|日本武尊|1=Yamato Takeru|lt=Prince Yamato Takeru|3=ヤマトタケル|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Takeru|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ヤマトタケル|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q461258}}.
